description: Capability for the main window. Follows strict least-privilege: only explicit allow-* entries, no :default umbrella permissions for plugin-level capabilities. Shell plugin (tauri-plugin-shell) is intentionally absent — all sidecar spawn/kill is Rust-side only (see src-tauri/src/commands.rs). Do not add shell:allow-spawn, shell:allow-kill, opener:default, updater:default, process:default, or dialog:default here — all native dialogs go through Rust DialogExt and require no frontend IPC permission. When adding a new plugin capability, enumerate only the specific allow-* commands the frontend actually invokes.
